case_title: LAUREL KELLAM et al VS. CALIFORNIA ST. INVESTMENTS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PATRICK RAMSEY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-02-2010 AT 3:30PM.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KELLAM, LAUREL KELLAM, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA ST. INVESTMENTS, LLC RAMSEY, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (20 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KELLAM, LAUREL KELLAM, ANDREW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED MAR-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA ST. INVESTMENTS, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLAM, LAUREL KELLAM, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA ST. INVESTMENTS, LLC $525.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $640.00, DEFENDANT PATRICK RAMSEY DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA ST. INVESTMENTS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANT PRESENT. CO-DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
